message:
Add optimized header insertion methods to Headers struct

Add two new methods for faster header parsing paths:

insert_from_slice(name: &str, value: &[u8]):
- Avoids double allocation for header names
- Checks if name needs lowercasing in single pass
- Only allocates once for name (with or without transformation)
- Only allocates once for value copy
- Ideal for parsing where name/value are borrowed slices

insert_lowercase(name: String, value: Vec<u8>):
- Zero-copy insertion when name is already lowercase
- Debug assertion validates lowercase assumption
- Use for pre-validated or pre-processed headers
- Marked with safety note about incorrect usage

Performance impact:
- insert_from_slice: 1 allocation (best case) vs 2 (insert)
- insert_lowercase: 0 additional allocations

Both methods are #[inline] for parser integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
